fields.name: message_id
fields.description: Unique message identifier inside this chat. In specific instances (e.g., message containing a video sent to a big chat), the server might automatically schedule a message instead of sending it immediately. In such cases, this field will be 0 and the relevant message will be unusable until it is actually sent.

fields.name: message_thread_id
fields.description: Unique identifier of a message thread or forum topic to which the message belongs; for supergroups and private chats only

fields.name: direct_messages_topic
fields.description: Information about the direct messages chat topic that contains the message

fields.name: from
fields.description: Sender of the message; may be empty for messages sent to channels. For backward compatibility, if the message was sent on behalf of a chat, the field contains a fake sender user in non-channel chats.

fields.name: sender_chat
fields.description: Sender of the message when sent on behalf of a chat. For example, the supergroup itself for messages sent by its anonymous administrators or a linked channel for messages automatically forwarded to the channel's discussion group. For backward compatibility, if the message was sent on behalf of a chat, the field from contains a fake sender user in non-channel chats.

fields.name: sender_boost_count
fields.description: If the sender of the message boosted the chat, the number of boosts added by the user

fields.name: sender_business_bot
fields.description: The bot that actually sent the message on behalf of the business account. Available only for outgoing messages sent on behalf of the connected business account.

fields.name: sender_tag
fields.description: Tag or custom title of the sender of the message; for supergroups only

fields.name: date
fields.description: Date the message was sent in Unix time. It is always a positive number, representing a valid date.

fields.name: guest_query_id
fields.description: The unique identifier for the guest query. Use this identifier with the method answerGuestQuery to send a response message. If non-empty, the message belongs to the chat where the guest bot was summoned, which may not coincide with other existing bot chats sharing the same identifier.

fields.name: business_connection_id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the business connection from which the message was received. If non-empty, the message belongs to a chat of the corresponding business account that is independent from any potential bot chat which might share the same identifier.

fields.name: chat
fields.description: Chat the message belongs to

fields.name: forward_origin
fields.description: Information about the original message for forwarded messages

fields.name: is_topic_message
fields.description: True, if the message is sent to a topic in a forum supergroup or a private chat with the bot

fields.name: is_automatic_forward
fields.description: True, if the message is a channel post that was automatically forwarded to the connected discussion group

fields.name: reply_to_message
fields.description: For replies in the same chat and message thread, the original message. Note that the Message object in this field will not contain further reply_to_message fields even if it itself is a reply.

fields.name: external_reply
fields.description: Information about the message that is being replied to, which may come from another chat or forum topic

fields.name: quote
fields.description: For replies that quote part of the original message, the quoted part of the message

fields.name: reply_to_story
fields.description: For replies to a story, the original story

fields.name: reply_to_checklist_task_id
fields.description: Identifier of the specific checklist task that is being replied to

fields.name: reply_to_poll_option_id
fields.description: Persistent identifier of the specific poll option that is being replied to

fields.name: via_bot
fields.description: Bot through which the message was sent

fields.name: guest_bot_caller_user
fields.description: For a message sent by a guest bot, this is the user whose original message triggered the bot's response

fields.name: guest_bot_caller_chat
fields.description: For a message sent by a guest bot, this is the chat whose original message triggered the bot's response

fields.name: edit_date
fields.description: Date the message was last edited in Unix time

fields.name: has_protected_content
fields.description: True, if the message can't be forwarded

fields.name: is_from_offline
fields.description: True, if the message was sent by an implicit action, for example, as an away or a greeting business message, or as a scheduled message

fields.name: is_paid_post
fields.description: True, if the message is a paid post. Note that such posts must not be deleted for 24 hours to receive the payment and can't be edited.

fields.name: media_group_id
fields.description: The unique identifier inside this chat of a media message group this message belongs to

fields.name: author_signature
fields.description: Signature of the post author for messages in channels, or the custom title of an anonymous group administrator

fields.name: paid_star_count
fields.description: The number of Telegram Stars that were paid by the sender of the message to send it

fields.name: text
fields.description: For text messages, the actual UTF-8 text of the message

fields.name: entities
fields.description: For text messages, special entities like usernames, URLs, bot commands, etc. that appear in the text

fields.name: link_preview_options
fields.description: Options used for link preview generation for the message, if it is a text message and link preview options were changed

fields.name: suggested_post_info
fields.description: Information about suggested post parameters if the message is a suggested post in a channel direct messages chat. If the message is an approved or declined suggested post, then it can't be edited.

fields.name: effect_id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the message effect added to the message

fields.name: animation
fields.description: Message is an animation, information about the animation. For backward compatibility, when this field is set, the document field will also be set.

fields.name: audio
fields.description: Message is an audio file, information about the file

fields.name: document
fields.description: Message is a general file, information about the file

fields.name: live_photo
fields.description: Message is a live photo, information about the live photo. For backward compatibility, when this field is set, the photo field will also be set.

fields.name: paid_media
fields.description: Message contains paid media; information about the paid media

fields.name: photo
fields.description: Message is a photo, available sizes of the photo

fields.name: sticker
fields.description: Message is a sticker, information about the sticker

fields.name: story
fields.description: Message is a forwarded story

fields.name: video
fields.description: Message is a video, information about the video

fields.name: video_note
fields.description: Message is a video note, information about the video message

fields.name: voice
fields.description: Message is a voice message, information about the file

fields.name: caption
fields.description: Caption for the animation, audio, document, paid media, photo, video or voice

fields.name: caption_entities
fields.description: For messages with a caption, special entities like usernames, URLs, bot commands, etc. that appear in the caption

fields.name: show_caption_above_media
fields.description: True, if the caption must be shown above the message media

fields.name: has_media_spoiler
fields.description: True, if the message media is covered by a spoiler animation

fields.name: checklist
fields.description: Message is a checklist

fields.name: contact
fields.description: Message is a shared contact, information about the contact

fields.name: dice
fields.description: Message is a dice with random value

fields.name: game
fields.description: Message is a game, information about the game. More about games »

fields.name: poll
fields.description: Message is a native poll, information about the poll

fields.name: venue
fields.description: Message is a venue, information about the venue. For backward compatibility, when this field is set, the location field will also be set.

fields.name: location
fields.description: Message is a shared location, information about the location

fields.name: new_chat_members
fields.description: New members that were added to the group or supergroup and information about them (the bot itself may be one of these members)

fields.name: left_chat_member
fields.description: A member was removed from the group, information about them (this member may be the bot itself)

fields.name: chat_owner_left
fields.description: Service message: chat owner has left

fields.name: chat_owner_changed
fields.description: Service message: chat owner has changed

fields.name: new_chat_title
fields.description: A chat title was changed to this value

fields.name: new_chat_photo
fields.description: A chat photo was change to this value

fields.name: delete_chat_photo
fields.description: Service message: the chat photo was deleted

fields.name: group_chat_created
fields.description: Service message: the group has been created

fields.name: supergroup_chat_created
fields.description: Service message: the supergroup has been created. This field can't be received in a message coming through updates, because bot can't be a member of a supergroup when it is created. It can only be found in reply_to_message if someone replies to a very first message in a directly created supergroup.

fields.name: channel_chat_created
fields.description: Service message: the channel has been created. This field can't be received in a message coming through updates, because bot can't be a member of a channel when it is created. It can only be found in reply_to_message if someone replies to a very first message in a channel.

fields.name: message_auto_delete_timer_changed
fields.description: Service message: auto-delete timer settings changed in the chat

fields.name: migrate_to_chat_id
fields.description: The group has been migrated to a supergroup with the specified identifier. This number may have more than 32 significant bits and some programming languages may have difficulty/silent defects in interpreting it. But it has at most 52 significant bits, so a signed 64-bit integer or double-precision float type are safe for storing this identifier.

fields.name: migrate_from_chat_id
fields.description: The supergroup has been migrated from a group with the specified identifier. This number may have more than 32 significant bits and some programming languages may have difficulty/silent defects in interpreting it. But it has at most 52 significant bits, so a signed 64-bit integer or double-precision float type are safe for storing this identifier.

fields.name: pinned_message
fields.description: Specified message was pinned. Note that the Message object in this field will not contain further reply_to_message fields even if it itself is a reply.

fields.name: invoice
fields.description: Message is an invoice for a payment, information about the invoice. More about payments »

fields.name: successful_payment
fields.description: Message is a service message about a successful payment, information about the payment. More about payments »

fields.name: refunded_payment
fields.description: Message is a service message about a refunded payment, information about the payment. More about payments »

fields.name: users_shared
fields.description: Service message: users were shared with the bot

fields.name: chat_shared
fields.description: Service message: a chat was shared with the bot

fields.name: gift
fields.description: Service message: a regular gift was sent or received

fields.name: unique_gift
fields.description: Service message: a unique gift was sent or received

fields.name: gift_upgrade_sent
fields.description: Service message: upgrade of a gift was purchased after the gift was sent

fields.name: connected_website
fields.description: The domain name of the website on which the user has logged in. More about Telegram Login »

fields.name: write_access_allowed
fields.description: Service message: the user allowed the bot to write messages after adding it to the attachment or side menu, launching a Web App from a link, or accepting an explicit request from a Web App sent by the method requestWriteAccess

fields.name: passport_data
fields.description: Telegram Passport data

fields.name: proximity_alert_triggered
fields.description: Service message. A user in the chat triggered another user's proximity alert while sharing Live Location.

fields.name: boost_added
fields.description: Service message: user boosted the chat

fields.name: chat_background_set
fields.description: Service message: chat background set

fields.name: checklist_tasks_done
fields.description: Service message: some tasks in a checklist were marked as done or not done

fields.name: checklist_tasks_added
fields.description: Service message: tasks were added to a checklist

fields.name: direct_message_price_changed
fields.description: Service message: the price for paid messages in the corresponding direct messages chat of a channel has changed

fields.name: forum_topic_created
fields.description: Service message: forum topic created

fields.name: forum_topic_edited
fields.description: Service message: forum topic edited

fields.name: forum_topic_closed
fields.description: Service message: forum topic closed

fields.name: forum_topic_reopened
fields.description: Service message: forum topic reopened

fields.name: general_forum_topic_hidden
fields.description: Service message: the 'General' forum topic hidden

fields.name: general_forum_topic_unhidden
fields.description: Service message: the 'General' forum topic unhidden

fields.name: giveaway_created
fields.description: Service message: a scheduled giveaway was created

fields.name: giveaway
fields.description: The message is a scheduled giveaway message

fields.name: giveaway_winners
fields.description: A giveaway with public winners was completed

fields.name: giveaway_completed
fields.description: Service message: a giveaway without public winners was completed

fields.name: managed_bot_created
fields.description: Service message: user created a bot that will be managed by the current bot

fields.name: paid_message_price_changed
fields.description: Service message: the price for paid messages has changed in the chat

fields.name: poll_option_added
fields.description: Service message: answer option was added to a poll

fields.name: poll_option_deleted
fields.description: Service message: answer option was deleted from a poll

fields.name: suggested_post_approved
fields.description: Service message: a suggested post was approved

fields.name: suggested_post_approval_failed
fields.description: Service message: approval of a suggested post has failed

fields.name: suggested_post_declined
fields.description: Service message: a suggested post was declined

fields.name: suggested_post_paid
fields.description: Service message: payment for a suggested post was received

fields.name: suggested_post_refunded
fields.description: Service message: payment for a suggested post was refunded

fields.name: video_chat_scheduled
fields.description: Service message: video chat scheduled

fields.name: video_chat_started
fields.description: Service message: video chat started

fields.name: video_chat_ended
fields.description: Service message: video chat ended

fields.name: video_chat_participants_invited
fields.description: Service message: new participants invited to a video chat

fields.name: web_app_data
fields.description: Service message: data sent by a Web App

fields.name: reply_markup
fields.description: Inline keyboard attached to the message. login_url buttons are represented as ordinary url buttons.
